title: How to add someone in copy of a ticket when you send a request in the SSC ?
bodyHtml:
You will be able to CC someone directly when submitting a request through the SSC.
 

How does it work ? 

  • If you have cc'd someone, they will receive a first email when our team has answered back the initial request from you.
  • Starting from here, this person will be able to see the initial messages and answer back directly per email. All messages are updated in the cases for our agents, but also in the Help Center, on your seller portal.


NB: When you are dealing with a tough or touchy case that needs support from your SSM you can put them in a copy of your ticket. Thus, they will also receive the answer by the support team through mail.
Besides, your SSM can see all of your tickets in our system (even without CC).
